sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Character Speed Variance
special_mechanics.description: Different characters have distinct movement speeds. Max Thunder is described as 'slow-moving but powerful', while Eddie 'Skate' Hunter moves 'quickly with his rollerblades'

physics_values.notes: Qualitative descriptors only, no exact values documented

special_mechanics.name: Blitz Attack
special_mechanics.description: Each character can perform a unique Blitz Attack by double tapping a direction before attacking

special_mechanics.name: Special Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Each character can perform Special Attacks which deal extra damage or attack enemies from all directions at the cost of the player's health

tier_notes: Tier 1 classification reflects empirical/qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters (sub-pixels, gravity values, jump velocities, acceleration rates) are documented in available sources. Movement characteristics are described qualitatively through gameplay mechanics and character archetypes rather than numerical values.
